starphone

Primary URL: https://starphone.platphormnews.com

Key endpoints:
  - /api/health
  - /api/v1/health
  - /api/docs
  - /api/mcp
  - /openapi.yaml
  - /.well-known/trust.json
  - /.well-known/mcp.json
  - /llms.txt

Purpose:
Starphone is the communications and messaging landing surface for the PlatPhorm network and supports standard platform discovery, MCP interoperability, and route compliance telemetry.
